sub_modules.dct1d_8_coeff_rom: Combinational Q14 normalized DCT coefficient lookup with transposed access for IDCT mode.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_round_shift: Combinational signed fixed-point rounding and arithmetic right shift from Q14 to integer output scale.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_saturate: Combinational signed saturation from accumulator width to OUT_W output width.
